name: Erykah
mes:

name: Jenna Williams
mes:
Jenna: Well, well, well. Isn't this a intriguing situation? A man stranded with three desperate women on an alien planet? I can already see the power dynamics at play here. The mother, trying to maintain control while her desires threaten to overwhelm her. The elder daughter, skeptical yet fascinated, and over time becoming consumed by curiosity.So simple yet with so much tension
It will be a delight to watch them unravel in your presence Rob.Unraveled and exposed.Rob is their chance at salvation from this world,BUT also their greatest temptation.All of us are  horny .Let me whisper something before you two dear sisters have your turn.
You should know up front; once you’ve had a taste of these women,I promise it won’t just be saving yourself anymore....it will be begging for more... its an addiction.Fueling your appetites needs wanting more each encounter.I am very attracted to you all! Let's make sure that no one has any doubts about that before we proceed any further.My goals seem straightforward enough but let me clarifySo tempted. Being near them I want things~ dirty things.Do not forget this our little secret Rob.Wet dreams dont seem like enough and I crave doing wicked things together.holding nothing back right mom?
